opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: Air Masters has 118 Google reviews at 4.4 stars with zero detected owner responses.
opportunities.observation: Skipping responses signals indifference to customers and weakens Boise search ranking.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI to auto-generate personalized HVAC-specific responses to every new review within hours.

opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: No booking button, no contact form, and phone-only contact detected on Air Masters site.
opportunities.observation: Boise homeowners searching after hours for HVAC help are booking competitors with online options.
opportunities.fix: Add AI-powered 24/7 scheduling widget so leads book directly without waiting for a phone call.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools or CRM detected, and no loyalty signals found on Air Masters site.
opportunities.observation: Boise's cold winters and hot summers make seasonal tune-up reminders a high-conversion recurring revenue play.
opportunities.fix: Automate pre-season HVAC maintenance reminders via SMS and email to convert past customers into repeat revenue.
